message:
refactor: Simplify gzip/zlib/marshal/heapq modules with h.wrap()

- zlib_mod.zig: Replace genCompress/genDecompress with h.wrap() (6 lines saved)
- marshal_mod.zig: Replace genLoads with h.wrap() (4 lines saved)
